name: Phillips Carbon Black Limited
summary: Phillips Carbon Black Limited produces, sells, and exports carbon black in India and internationally. The company operates through Carbon Black and Power segments. It offers various carbon black grades for the rubber industry. The company also manufactures specialty blacks for non-rubber applications, such as food contact plastics, fibers, wire and cables, films, geo-textile/geo-membrane, engineering plastics, adhesives and sealants, high-pressure pipes, drip irrigation pipe systems, printing inks, paints/coatings, batteries, and fertilizers. In addition, it generates and distributes electricity from the tail gas recovered from carbon black production. The company has a total of 76 MW of power generation capacity. It sells its carbon black through local distributors and channel partners. The company was founded in 1960 and is headquartered in Kolkata, India. Phillips Carbon Black Limited is a subsidiary of Rainbow Investments Limited.
